features.name: multi_port_memory_with_undefined_ports
features.description: Code should include a memory with multiple ports where port cells have undefined (x) address and data signal connections
features.snippet:
memory width 32 size 32 \regfile
cell $memrd \rp3
  parameter \ABITS 5
  parameter \WIDTH 32
  connect \ADDR 5'x
  connect \DATA 32'x
end
cell $memwr \wp
  parameter \ABITS 5
  parameter \WIDTH 32
  connect \ADDR 5'x
  connect \DATA 32'x
  connect \EN 32'x
end

features.name: memory_to_bram_mapping_width_mismatch
features.description: Code should include a memory and BRAM mapping where the memory data width differs from the target BRAM data width, causing a mismatch during mapping
features.snippet:
memory width 32 size 32 \regfile
# BRAM rule with dbits=4 but memory has dbits=32

features.name: memory_to_bram_port_count_mismatch
features.description: Code should include a memory with ports being mapped to a BRAM type that has zero ports defined, creating a port count mismatch
features.snippet:
memory width 32 size 32 \regfile
# Memory has rports=1 wports=1 but BRAM has wports=0 rports=0
